mva.explanation: MVA eigenvalue ratio λ_int/λ_min = 10.45. Reliable normal direction.

bz_status.label: Weakly southward
bz_status.explanation: Bz = -1.2 nT — mildly geoeffective. Auroral activity possible at high latitudes.

axes.y: Particle energy [eV] — log scale, 20 keV (bottom) → 6 MeV/n (top)
axes.color: log₁₀ differential flux [p cm⁻² s⁻¹ sr⁻¹ eV⁻¹]

psd.interpretation: Spectral index α = -0.88. Kolmogorov MHD turbulence predicts −1.67. Shallower than −5/3 → energy injection (shock, CME).

explanations.beta: β = 0.536 — Magnetically dominated. Alfvén waves govern dynamics.
explanations.alfven: V_A = 65.4 km/s — Alfvén wave speed along field lines.
explanations.mach_a: M_A = 6.02 — flow/Alfvén speed. Super-Alfvénic — bow shock forms at Earth.
explanations.mach_s: M_s = 3130133884179.81 — flow/sound speed. Supersonic — shocks can form.
